title: Quickstart URL + Public Repo Polish

public_facing_summary.what_is_grantlayer: GrantLayer is a developer-preview verification, audit, and compliance layer for agentic grant and funding workflows.
public_facing_summary.current_status: Developer Preview / GL-0.1; local evaluation and controlled pilot only.
public_facing_summary.first_run_path: Run the GL-168 first verifiable output example, then inspect the deterministic JSON record.

README states no real secrets and no customer data are required
